command: Write-Output "=== Check Desktop path ==="; Write-Output $env:USERPROFILE\Desktop; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop\antigravity"; Write-Output "=== List Desktop folders ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop" -Directory | Select-Object Name; Write-Output "=== Search for antigravity ==="; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE\Desktop" -Directory -Filter '*anti*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName; Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:USERPROFILE" -Directory -Filter '*antigravity*' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object FullName
description: Check if antigravity folder exists and list Desktop directories
